final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing educational infographic card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: flat cartoon illustration, bright children's book aesthetic, clean editorial infographic layout in the spirit of National Geographic Kids visual design
Composition: single large portrait card, bold title banner at the top, cartoon story scene occupying the center two-thirds, bullet-point key facts panel aligned along the right or bottom margin, generous white space between zones
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs — key figures (曹操, 刘备, 孙权, 周瑜, 诸葛亮) rendered as friendly rounded cartoon characters; fire ships on the Yangtze River as the central dramatic scene
Scene/backdrop: the Yangtze River at night, enemy warships in flames, smoke rising, opposing fleets facing each other across the water
Lighting/mood: warm orange and red glow from the fire, dramatic yet playful — exciting without being frightening for young readers
Color palette: warm red-orange fire as hero color, deep river blue as contrast, bright yellow title banner, soft cream card background
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: title "赤壁之战" must be large and legible at the top; key story bullet points must be clearly listed with punctuation marks beside each point; all text zones must not overlap the illustration; card must work as a single self-contained A4-portrait image
Avoid: realistic gore or violence, dark horror tones, cluttered overlapping text, adult-style infographic grids, watermarks, overly complex linework unsuitable for children
